column1: We _____ (walk) in the forest when it _____ (start) to rain.
She often _____ (visit) her friends when she _____ (live) in London.
By the age of four he _____ (learn) to read and write.
When the boys _____ (leave) the classroom they _____ (begin) to fight.
More than a year _____ (pass) when he _____ (learn) to drive.
I _____ (work) in the garden when I _____ (see) a bright light.
Jane _____ (be) a university teacher as her father _____ (be) before her.
